title: Truth Analysis
description: Derived result of deterministic structured-truth analysis (DEC-0011): open contradictions and gaps computed by Tier-0 code over explicitly structured fact slots, relative to one versioned truth profile. No model, provider, or network field exists; contradictions are open until a human decision resolves them — the analyzer never selects a winner; claims without structured fact metadata are listed explicitly, never parsed by keyword or silently ignored.

truth_profile_ref.description: artifact_id of the truth profile this analysis is relative to; gaps exist only relative to it

analyzer_version.description: version label of the deterministic analyzer that produced this artifact

analyzed_claim_refs.description: exact claim artifact_ids analyzed, deterministically sorted (semantic layer); duplicates are rejected

open_contradictions.description: one entry per single-cardinality fact slot holding two or more distinct normalized values; sorted by fact_key (semantic layer)

distinct_values.description: the distinct normalized values involved; JSON equality is type-sensitive, so string "1" and number 1 are distinct entries

description.description: deterministic human-readable description derived only from the fact key and counts — never invented evidence

blocking_publication.description: copied from the truth profile's blocking_if_conflicting; the analyzer assigns no blocking status of its own

status.description: fixed to open in this phase: resolution is a downstream human decision (INV-HUM-001(3))

gaps.description: missing or unverified required slots relative to the truth profile; sorted by fact_key (semantic layer)

why_needed.description: copied from the truth profile slot's why_needed

blocking.description: copied from the truth profile's blocking_if_missing; the analyzer assigns no blocking status of its own

claim_refs.description: relevant unconfirmed claim references for unverified gaps; empty for missing gaps

unstructured_claim_refs.description: claims that could not participate because they lack structured fact metadata; listed explicitly, never keyword-parsed, text-compared, or silently ignored

unprofiled_fact_claim_refs.description: structured claims whose fact_key has no slot in the referenced truth profile; they were not contradiction- or gap-analyzed (the profile is workflow-scoped, not a universal ontology)

open_contradictions.description: single-cardinality fact slot 'identity.primary_name' carries 2 distinct normalized values across 2 eligible claims; resolution requires a human decision

gaps.what: no eligible structured claim supplies required fact slot 'market.default_locale'
gaps.why_needed: locale decides rendering direction and copy language defaults
